name: Extinction Chess
author: AGP
description: Extinction Chess (a.k.a. Survival of the Species, R. Wayne Schmittberger, 1985): standard chess board, setup and movement, but you WIN the instant any ONE type of the opponent's pieces becomes extinct -- capture their last knight, their last bishop, all their pawns, or even their king, and you win. The king is NOT royal: there is no check, checkmate or stalemate, and moving 'into check' is perfectly legal. Pawns promote to Q/R/B/N or even K. Castling is legal even in or through check. White (player 1) moves first.
